package rulecoverage

func PositiveStableValueNormalizationInInnerLoop() string {
    ruleID := "stable_value_normalization_in_inner_loop"
    family := "hot_path"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Stable value normalization (ToLower, TrimSpace, etc.) repeated inside inner loops."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
